narrative:
Lewis Twp North (precinct in Brown County) has 1,136 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.8 percentage points.
